publisher: U.S. Department of Veterans Affairs and U.S. Department of Defense

curation.rule: Ingest recommendation and management sections plus compact clinician cards; exclude methodology and evidence-review appendices.
curation.verbatim_policy: Every quote is a contiguous span of normalized source text; no summarization or paraphrase.

license_policy.basis: U.S. Government work; government-produced VA website material is not copyright protected under the VA policy.
license_policy.scope_note: Text-layer ingestion only. Embedded figures, seals, logos, and explicitly attributed third-party material are excluded.

documents.title: VA/DoD Clinical Practice Guideline for the Management of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus

license.name: U.S. Government work; not copyright protected per VA policy

included_sections: Appendix B: Glycemic Control Targets and Monitoring
Appendix I: Alternative Text Descriptions of Algorithm
excluded_sections: Appendix H: Literature Review Search Terms and Strategy
curation.boundary_note: Printed page 71 is clipped immediately before X. Research Priorities.
curation.figure_policy: Graphical algorithm pages excluded; VA-authored text alternative used.

documents.title: VA/DoD Clinical Practice Guideline for the Management of Type 2 Diabetes Mellitus: Quick Reference Guide

license.name: U.S. Government work; not copyright protected per VA policy

included_sections: All nonblank recommendation and algorithm pages
excluded_sections: Cover-only and blank physical PDF pages
curation.boundary_note: The current Version 6.0 release has no artifact titled Pocket Card; this is the official compact clinician guide.
curation.figure_policy: Text layer only; no embedded graphics or logos retained.

documents.title: VA/DoD Clinical Practice Guideline for the Diagnosis and Management of Hypertension in the Primary Care Setting

license.name: U.S. Government work; not copyright protected per VA policy

included_sections: VII. Recommendations except adapted third-party measurement tables
Appendix K: Alternative Text Descriptions of Algorithms
excluded_sections: Printed page 28 adapted AHA measurement table
Opening adapted AHA cuff-size table on printed page 29
Appendix G: Guidance for Conducting Office Blood Pressure Measurement
Appendix H: Guidance for Conducting Home Blood Pressure Measurement
Appendix J: Literature Review Search Terms and Strategy
curation.boundary_note: Printed page 29 begins after the adapted cuff-size table, at the VA/DoD discussion.
curation.figure_policy: Graphical algorithm pages excluded; VA-authored text alternative used.

documents.title: VA/DoD Hypertension Clinical Practice Guideline Pocket Card

license.name: U.S. Government work; not copyright protected per VA policy

included_sections: VA/DoD screening, diagnosis, treatment, goals, and treatment-optimization text
excluded_sections: Office and home blood-pressure measurement blocks adapted from AHA material
Diet-protocol tables on the graphical card
curation.figure_policy: Text layer only; third-party-adapted blocks and embedded graphics excluded.

documents.title: VA/DoD Clinical Practice Guideline on Lipid Management for Cardiovascular Disease Risk Reduction

license.name: U.S. Government work; not copyright protected per VA policy

included_sections: Appendix G: Alternative Text Description of Algorithm
excluded_sections: Appendix F: Literature Review Search Terms and Strategy
Appendix K: Familial Hypercholesterolemia (adapted third-party tables)
Appendix L: Pharmacogenomic Testing (table reproduced with permission)
curation.figure_policy: Graphical algorithm pages excluded; VA-authored text alternative used.

documents.title: VA/DoD Lipid Management for Cardiovascular Disease Risk Reduction Pocket Card

license.name: U.S. Government work; not copyright protected per VA policy

included_sections: Management algorithm text and clinical sidebars
curation.figure_policy: Text layer only; no embedded graphics retained.

excluded_sources.name: ADA Standards of Care
excluded_sources.reason: License explicitly restricts text/data mining and machine learning use.

excluded_sources.name: KDIGO
excluded_sources.reason: Conflicting reuse terms and embedded third-party figures.

excluded_sources.name: JAMA PDFs
excluded_sources.reason: AMA reserves text/data-mining and AI-training rights.

excluded_sources.name: Diabetes Pocket Card (2017)
excluded_sources.reason: Excluded as a Version 5.0/2017 version mismatch; the current 2023 release provides a Version 6.0 Quick Reference Guide instead.

excluded_sources.name: HTN AHA-adapted measurement blocks
excluded_sources.reason: Downstream license is unclear; excluded without further investigation.

excluded_sources.name: Lipids third-party appendices K-L
excluded_sources.reason: Contain adapted or permission-reproduced third-party tables with unclear downstream rights.
